notes: Routing fix + throughput controls. (1) Fixes a regression where domestic Iranian (.ir) sites were tunneled through the proxy instead of going direct — the domestic-bypass guard mis-fired (the word 'direct' contains 'ir'), so the Iran-direct rule was never added; sing-box/Hiddify/NekoBox/Karing and Clash/mihomo now both get a self-contained .ir direct rule (no remote rule-set needed, so it works even when GitHub is blocked). Make sure the 'Domestic bypass / ایران‌مستقیم' toggle is on. (2) Real upload backpressure: the upstream relay now drains at the remote socket's pace (writer.ready) instead of buffering, so large uploads are smoother and the 32MB safety ceiling is far harder to hit. (3) Optional per-connection speed limit (Settings -> Speed limit, KB/s; 0 = unlimited) with optional per-user override on the Users page — a fairness backstop, off by default. Drop-in worker.js replacement; no config/KV/D1 changes. Includes everything from 3.8.2. Update in-app from Settings -> Update panel.
